programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl offers to let Dana wear her wedding dress, unaware that the gown was destroyed in a fiery sports celebration years earlier.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: An attractive woman's suggestion leads Jim to grow a mustache, much to the dismay of Cheryl, who retaliates by coloring her hair.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Andy decides to learn how to dance for his sister's wedding, he turns to Jim -- a closet dancer -- for lessons.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: In order to avoid going to an opera with Cheryl, Jim asks an elderly widower to be her escort.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim is dismayed when he has to drive Gracie to spelling bee tournaments all over the state.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim is shocked to learn that his recently deceased friend will be buried with a rare baseball card he stole from Jim.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim and Cheryl adjust the clocks to get the kids to bed earlier so they can have more quality time together.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don are forced to take sides in a feud when Andi and Marcy realize they were high school rivals.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi have an important talk with Teddy and Kate, their awkward approach makes the kids uncomfortable.

programme.title: Man With a Plan

programme.title: Man With a Plan

programme.desc: Black and blue belt; soup's on you; gas leak detective.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release - the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary. A one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown
programme.desc: Clips that show where we shouldn't take a cell phone; why it's easier to read music notes when the sheet music is right-side up.

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Kelso becomes afraid of fatherhood when he meets Brooke's (Shannon Elizabeth) mother, Carolyn (Morgan Fairchild); Eric has second thoughts about marrying Donna and leaves town to sort things out.

programme.title: Home Improvement

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Dottie makes an unexpected connection when she meets a fellow stroke survivor at physical therapy; Bob and Douglas try to keep tabs on Christina while she's away at an emotional wellness spa.

programme.desc: When Vanessa's sister (Christina Moore) visits, Mike assumes he is about to be confronted with another loan request; Kyle worries what Mike will think when Kristen and Kyle break up.
